name: Barton Associates
description: National locum tenens staffing agency placing physicians, dentists, and advanced practitioners in temporary assignments at facilities across Kentucky, including various specialties like vascular/interventional radiology.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I have no complaints about Barton; the interactions were met with the usual high standard of professionalism.
I am happy with the service and relationship I have with the Barton Associates Locum Tenens Recruitment Specialist.
She listens to me and is a joy to work with.
Always prompt response. Smooth comfortable service.

sentiment.summary: Barton Associates maintains an excellent reputation with universally positive reviews praising their professional staff, responsive communication, and quality agent relationships.

name: Interim HealthCare
description: Leading medical staffing agency in Kentucky providing locum tenens physicians, nurse practitioners, physician assistants, alongside nursing and allied health professionals.

name: LocumTenens.com
description: Full-service healthcare staffing agency and job board listing family practice and hospitalist locum tenens opportunities in southern Kentucky.
